// ==== Ordering/infrastructure/IntegrationEventDispatcher.ts ====
// <auto-generated/>
import { IntegrationEventHandler, OutboxStore } from '../../infrastructure-runtime';

/** Drains the Ordering outbox and delivers each integration event to the handler in order. */
export class IntegrationEventDispatcher {
  constructor(
    private readonly outbox: OutboxStore,
    private readonly handler: IntegrationEventHandler,
  ) {}

  async dispatchPending(): Promise<void> {
    const pending = await this.outbox.unprocessed();
    for (const message of pending) {
      await this.handler.handle(message);
      await this.outbox.markProcessed(message);
    }
  }
}

// ==== Ordering/infrastructure/UnitOfWork.ts ====
// <auto-generated/>
import { InMemoryOutboxStore, OutboxMessage, OutboxStore } from '../../infrastructure-runtime';
import { IUnitOfWork } from '../abstractions/IUnitOfWork';
import { IOrderRepository } from '../repositories/IOrderRepository';
import { OrderRepository } from './OrderRepository';

/** In-memory unit of work over the Ordering context's aggregate repositories. */
export class UnitOfWork implements IUnitOfWork {
  private readonly pending: object[] = [];

  constructor(
    readonly orders: IOrderRepository = new OrderRepository(),
    private readonly outbox: OutboxStore = new InMemoryOutboxStore(),
  ) {}

  /** Enqueues an integration event to be written to the outbox on the next saveChangesAsync. */
  enqueue(integrationEvent: object): void {
    this.pending.push(integrationEvent);
  }

  async saveChangesAsync(): Promise<void> {
    for (const integrationEvent of this.pending) {
      await this.outbox.add(OutboxMessage.from(integrationEvent));
    }
    this.pending.length = 0;
  }
}
